Headline: #81 Lawrence Temporary Westbound Reroute near Lawrence/Damen
ShortDescription: Westbound 81 Lawrence  buses are temporarily rerouted via Lawrence, Damen, Foster, Western and Lawrence: due to, street blockage near Lawrence/Damen.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Westbound# 81 Lawrence  buses are temporarily rerouted via Lawrence, Damen, Foster, Western and Lawrence: due to, street blockage near Lawrence/Damen.

Eastbound buses are not affected.

Allow extra travel time.

Headline: #82 Kimball-Homan Temporary Reroute at Kimball/Glenlake
ShortDescription: 82 Kimball-Homan buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions due to police activity near Kimball/Glenlake.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
#82 Kimball-Homan buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions via Kimball, Peterson, Jersey, Lincoln, McCormick and over regular route, due to police activity near Kimball/Glenlake.
